prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京大学医学部在新疆维吾尔自治区理科仅2023年有公开录取数据，当年最低录取位次约48名。由于该校在新疆招生名额极少（仅1人），位次长期处于全省顶尖 水平，波动空间极为有限；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年为1人，2026年仍为1人，招生规模连续多年保持不变。在极小的招生基数下，计划持平意 味着供需关系高度稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜北京大学位列全国第2名，医学部本身在医学领域 处于国内绝对顶尖地位，对高分考生具有极强吸引力；北京大学在2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，但北京大学医学部作为独立招生代码的医学顶尖院校，其 声誉相对独立；抖音热度方面北京大学排名第3（高热），整体关注度极高；未见投档断档等异常记录；依托北京大学学科体系，临床医学获评A级、口腔医学A 级、基础医学A级、护理学A+、药学A+，医学学科综合实力位居全国前列，对有志于医学的顶尖考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续偏热（2024年hea t_index=70.19，评估为推荐），口腔医学同样偏热（72.31）；新疆2026年高考总人数约23.8万人，较2025年（约7.65万）大幅增长，按历史比例估算理科考生约16.3万人，考生 规模显著扩大加剧了顶尖院校的竞争新疆理科本科一批从2021年405分波动上升至2025年421分，整体竞争环境趋紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次稳定在极高水 平、招生计划连续持平、考生规模大幅增长导致竞争加剧、学校层次与专业热度维持高位吸引力等因素，预计2026年北京大学医学部在新疆理科的最低录取位次将较2023年基准略 有前移。预测最低位次约46名，波动区间31–61名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京大学医学部在新疆理科仅招收临床医学（八年制本博连读）1个专业，无分档选择空间。位次在预测区间（31–61名）内的考生可积极报考，位次明显优于区间上限（即31名 以内）把握较大；位次接近区间下限（61名左右）则存在一定风险，建议作为冲刺志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Peking University Health Science Center only has publicly available admission data for 2023 in Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region Science category, with the minimum admission rank approximately 48. Due to the extremely small enrollment quota in Xinjiang (only 1 person), the rank has long been at the top level of the province, with very limited fluctuation space; the enrollment plan for Science in Xinjiang was 1 person in 2023 and remains 1 person in 2026, with the enrollment scale unchanged for many consecutive years. Under a very small enrollment base, a stable plan means a highly stable supply-demand relationship.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd nationally, and the Health Science Center itself is at the absolute top level in the medical field, strongly attracting high-scoring students; Peking University's reputation evaluation in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, but Peking University Health Science Center, as a top medical institution with an independent admission code, has a relatively independent reputation; on Douyin, Peking University ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high overall attention; no abnormal records such as admission gaps have been seen; relying on Peking University's discipline system, Clinical Medicine is rated A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Nursing A+, Pharmacy A+, with comprehensive medical discipline strength ranking among the top in the country, strongly attracting top students interested in medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine major continues to be relatively hot (2024 heat_index=70.19, assessed as recommended), Stomatology is also relatively hot (72.31); the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025 (about 76,500). Estimated by historical proportion, Science candidates are about 163,000. The significant expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition for top institutions. The Xinjiang Science first batch undergraduate score line fluctuated upward from 405 in 2021 to 421 in 2025, indicating a tightening overall competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical rankings stable at extremely high levels, enrollment plan unchanged for consecutive years, intensified competition due to significant candidate pool growth, and sustained high attractiveness of school level and major popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank of Peking University Health Science Center in Xinjiang Science in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2023 baseline. The predicted minimum rank is about 46, with a fluctuation range of 31–61.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Peking University Health Science Center only recruits 1 major, Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program), in Xinjiang Science, with no tier selection options. Candidates with ranks within the predicted range (31–61) can actively apply; those with ranks significantly better than the upper limit of the range (i.e., within 31) have a higher chance; those with ranks close to the lower limit of the range (around 61) face some risk and are advised to use it as a reach choice.
